steps.title: You are classified as Micro Offline Biller
steps.subtitle: S1 Segment · Simplified Journey
steps.description: Based on your inputs, we identified the simplest onboarding path: no API development and no technical integration required.
steps.tip: Your onboarding can complete in under one hour and go live in 24 hours.

steps.title: Verify Your Identity
steps.subtitle: Step 1 of 7
steps.description: Use Aadhaar OTP based eKYC verification to validate identity quickly.
steps.tip: Identity details are verified only for onboarding and should not be retained in advisory mode.

steps.title: Share Business Details
steps.subtitle: Step 2 of 7
steps.description: Collect business profile and auto-map BBPS category for onboarding.
steps: Describe bill type in plain language.
Add operating state and optional GSTIN.

steps.title: Link Settlement Account
steps.subtitle: Step 3 of 7
steps.description: Verify bank account using penny-drop to enable settlements.
steps: Provide account holder name, account number, and IFSC.

steps.title: Configure Bill Fields
steps.subtitle: Step 4 of 7
steps.description: Choose simple customer identifiers for bill fetch in payment apps.

steps.title: Sign Biller Agreement
steps.subtitle: Step 5 of 7
steps.description: Review and e-sign standard micro biller agreement.
steps: Review key terms (settlement, dispute SLA, validity).

steps.title: Upload First Bill Set
steps.subtitle: Step 6 of 7
steps.description: Upload initial bills through photo, CSV, or manual entry.
steps: Choose upload method: photo, CSV, or manual.
Upload consumer references and due amounts.

steps.title: Go Live on BBPS
steps.subtitle: Step 7 of 7
steps.description: After checks complete, biller profile is activated across BBPS channels.
steps.tip: Share biller name with customers so they can discover and pay from any BBPS app.
